/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  -O2 --extended-lambda -lineinfo -fopenmp -g --generate-code=arch=compute_75,code=[compute_75,sm_75] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/HyraxTest.dir/test/HyraxTest.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/HyraxTest.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  libzkLLMd.a depends/libsnark/libsnark/libsnarkd.a depends/libsnark/depends/libff/libff/libffd.a  -lcrypto -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
